node.text: Evan recently bought a new Prius for his active lifestyle and road trips, but it broke down soon after purchase.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car after Prius broke down") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Evan has a new Prius after his old one broke down, which he got repaired and sold.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car after Prius broke down") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Evan sees setbacks as a chance to explore new ways of staying active and traveling.
Evan believes it makes a big difference to have support when trying new things.
